$comment: C20 bead-type schema registry. Canonical bundle document handed to C22 register_bundle (D-3). Derived from architectures/v4/spec/C20-bead-schema.md sections 4.1, 4.5.0-4.5.5. bundle_id is the D-2 namespace; anything else is the XC-4 collision (E6).

envelope.$comment: Common envelope on every bead type (C20 spec 4.5.0).

id.semantics: stable identifier; target of gc bd find / gc converge resume <id>

type.semantics: registry type tag; closed set (section 3 invariant)

created_by.semantics: actor attribution present on every bead (P9). Wire form is colon-delimited 'kind:id' per D-29.

depends_on.semantics: directed dependency edges (P10). Field name per D-28.

status.semantics: lifecycle state of the bead (FAITHFUL-FILL section 4.1 / 4.5.0)

version.semantics: schema-version pin against which this bead was written (section 4.4). Optional on the bead; the authoritative bundle version is at the top of this document.

overridden.semantics: reference to the action/decision the operator overrode

surfaced_in.semantics: back-pointer to a pattern-surfacing report bead if rolled up

fix_task.$comment: spec 4.5.2 - diagnosis-generated repair unit (README P11; Phase 3b). Carries XC-3 bound slots.

diagnosis_ref.semantics: pointer to the diagnosis that produced this fix (chain edge diagnosis --produces--> fix_task)

anomaly_ref.semantics: pointer to the originating anomaly carried through diagnosis

spec_ref.semantics: the C08 spec the fix must satisfy ('fix the spec, not the output')

attempt_no.semantics: which attempt this fix_task is for the same anomaly (XC-3 slot). C39 owns the value.

max_attempts.semantics: bound beyond which the chain escalates (XC-3 slot; value is C39 policy)

escalated.semantics: true once the chain was handed to a human (XC-3 slot; C39 sets)

factory_build.$comment: spec 4.5.3 - factory self-build record (AI-CONTEXT section 16; D-40 lifecycle). Canonical resume path is type=factory_build + status=in_progress (XC-2 resolution).

transfused_from.semantics: gene-transfusion attribution: external exemplar(s) this component transfused

status.semantics: D-40 lifecycle, aligned to envelope {open,in_progress,closed}. in_progress on build-start; C52 advances to closed after Phase B deploy. Go/no-go outcome lives in milestone_verdict.

workflow_handle.semantics: resume token for gc converge resume <bead_id>. Required when status=in_progress (see validator resume-completeness check); may be absent on pre-dispatch write.

gate_decision.semantics: C52 human-review record {decision, reviewer_id, decision_ts, notes, bead_id}

milestone_verdict.semantics: C53 bootstrap go/no-go outcome; consumed by C54

exemplar_set.semantics: C51-owned declared exemplar set; >=1 required (>=1-exemplar invariant)

factory_build_in_progress.$comment: spec 4.5.4 - PRE-D-40 legacy-compatibility alias for the AI-CONTEXT section 16 literal query 'gc bd find --type factory_build_in_progress'. New code MUST use factory_build + status=in_progress. Carries resume-completeness fields so the literal query resolves verbatim.

workflow_handle.semantics: resume token; required on this legacy type (E5 resume-completeness, AI-CONTEXT section 16 695-699)

anomaly.$comment: spec 4.5.5 - chain-derived, PROVISIONAL (OQ-C20-2). Self-heal chain head.

signal_ref.semantics: pointer to the detection signal (C36/C37) that fired

anomaly_ref.semantics: the anomaly this diagnoses (edge anomaly --diagnosed_by--> diagnosis)

resolution.$comment: spec 4.5.5 - chain-derived, PROVISIONAL (OQ-C20-2). Carries XC-3 closure slots; its existence + positive verdict is loop closure.

closes.semantics: the fix_task this resolution closes (XC-3 slot; edge fix_task --resolved_by--> resolution)

verdict.semantics: terminal outcome (G18 terminal-state enum); set by C39

score_record.$comment: spec 3.1 - registered into the bundle per D-3 so C22 resolve_type can locate it, but schema is OWNED BY C32 (D-39). C20 only registers the type; field detail lives in C32 3.2. Minimal envelope-only entry here.

satisfaction_metric.$comment: spec 3.1 - registered into the bundle per D-3 so C22 resolve_type can locate it, but schema is OWNED BY C33 (D-39). C20 only registers the type; field detail lives in C33 3.4. Minimal envelope-only entry here.
